content.Text:
[Sun 2026-04-19 13:16 CDT] You are finishing two GA4 dashboard HTML files. Two specific tasks remain for each file. --- ## FILE 1: `/Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/audi-baton-rouge-dashboard.html` ### Task A: Add "Top Content Pages" section Find the section that ends with the "🔑 Top 10 Model Pages" table (look for the closing `` after that section). Insert this new section immediately after it, before the `.insights-card` div: ```html
📄 Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page
Ranked by sessions · Last 90 Days · GA4 Property 381984706
RankPageSessionsAvg Time on Page
1Audi Q5 Model Page4,8213:55
2New Inventory3,1022:14
3Audi Q3 Model Page2,8763:28
4Certified Pre-Owned2,3412:43
5Service Specials1,9871:08
6Audi Q5 vs BMW X39344:12
7Schedule Service8121:51
8Finance Application6232:09
9Oil Change Special5890:52
10Audi e-tron Model Page4412:37
Avg time on page indicates content depth and user intent. Pages >2:00 signal high buying intent.
``` ### Task B: Verify summary cards show full comparison Check the render() function where summaryCards innerHTML is set. It should show delta + percent + comparison line. If it currently shows just percent (like `${Math.abs(ch)}%`), update it to match this pattern: ```javascript if(ch!==null){const delta=v-cv;const sign=delta>=0?'+':'';return `
${l}
${fmt(v)}
${arrow(ch)} ${sign}${fmt(delta)} (${Math.abs(ch)}%)
${fmt(cv)} → ${fmt(v)} · vs ${comp.label}
`;} return `
${l}
${fmt(v)}
—
`; ``` --- ## FILE 2: `/Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/bmw-jackson-dashboard.html` ### Task A: Add "Top Content Pages" section Find the "🔑 Top 10 Model Pages" section and insert this immediately after it, before the insights card: ```html
📄 Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page
Ranked by sessions · Last 90 Days · GA4 Property 255835161
RankPageSessionsAvg Time on Page
1BMW X3 Model Page5,2343:48
2New Inventory4,1022:03
3BMW X5 Model Page3,8764:01
4Used Inventory3,2412:28
5BMW X3 vs Mercedes GLC1,4564:44
6Service Specials1,2341:15
7Certified Pre-Owned1,1022:55
8Finance Application743
I'll start by reading both files to find the insertion points and current summary card code.

content.Text:
Both files are updated:

**audi-baton-rouge-dashboard.html**
- Task A: Inserted the "Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page" section after the Top 10 Model Pages table.
- Task B: Already had the correct summary card format (delta + percent + comparison line) — no changes needed.

**bmw-jackson-dashboard.html**
- Task A: Inserted the "Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page" section after the Top 10 Model Pages table.
- Task B: Updated summary cards to show delta with sign, percentage, and the comparison line (`old → new · vs label`).

output.text:
Both edits are done:

- **Task A**: Inserted the "Top Content Pages -- Avg Time on Page" section (with 10 rows and color-coded time indicators) immediately after the "Top 10 Model Pages" section and before the insights card, at around line 252 in the updated file.

- **Task B**: Replaced the `renderSummaryCards` innerHTML builder so that when comparison data exists, each card now shows the delta with sign (e.g., `+5,187`), the percentage change in parentheses, and a comparison line showing `old_value -> new_value . vs label`. When no comparison data exists, it shows a neutral dash.
